claim: each tach timer selects the fastest audited eligible reliable steady-state provider for its contract in every measured primary environment
equivalence_rule: tach is faster than or materially tied with every eligible reference: its point estimate and conservative 95% CI comparison fit within max(1 ns, 5%)

quanta.implementation: quanta reads bare CNTVCT_EL0 on aarch64-apple-darwin; unlike XNU's wake-corrected wall-clock path, that counter can time-warp or diverge across suspend
